description: Inputs designed to trigger excessive memory allocation or CPU time via large string inputs. JSON.parse may allocate large internal structures. The atomic emit processes characters linearly with O(n) behavior; all large non-conforming inputs hit shape refusal quickly. Large conforming inputs test the O(n) claim.

inputs.label: large-string-element
inputs.rationale: 256-char string element; SyntaxError on opening '"' before any string content is examined

inputs.label: very-long-non-conforming-prefix
inputs.rationale: No leading '['; SyntaxError at position 0 — refuses immediately without scanning content

inputs.label: repeated-comma-flood
inputs.rationale: Empty elements (commas without values); SyntaxError at position 1 on first ',' (expects digit)

inputs.label: whitespace-flood-valid
inputs.rationale: Lots of whitespace around valid integers — optionalWhitespace handles this correctly; parses as [1,2,3]

inputs.label: deeply-long-integer
inputs.rationale: Very long single integer — 80 digits; both arms parse digits until end. Result is imprecise but no shape violation.

inputs.label: thousand-digit-integer
inputs.rationale: 1000 digit integer — maximum stress test for digit parsing loop; valid shape, result is Infinity

inputs.label: large-list-of-elements
inputs.rationale: 50 valid integer elements — tests O(n) parsing without triggering any shape violation

inputs.label: non-list-large-json
inputs.rationale: Large JSON object; leading '{' is immediate SyntaxError at position 0

inputs.label: space-only-input
inputs.rationale: Only whitespace — no '['; SyntaxError at position 0

inputs.label: repeated-valid-pattern
inputs.rationale: 20 zeros — valid, tests list parsing efficiency
